info.name: Platform V2 API
info.description:
End-to-end Postman collection for Platform V2 (compliance-engine API on :8090).

## Setup
1. Import collection + `environments/Platform-V2-Local.postman_environment.json`.
2. Select **Platform V2 — Local** environment.
3. Start stack: `scripts/start_platform_v2.ps1`.
4. Run **E2E Read Workflow** (existing scan) or **E2E Write Workflow** (new scan).

## Auth (default: Supabase)
1. Run **Authentication > Login (tenant_admin)** — saves `supabaseToken`
2. For admin routes, run **Login (super_admin)** — saves `adminSupabaseToken`
3. E2E workflows include login steps automatically

Set `authMode=dev_headers` to use X-Tenant-ID + X-Role instead.

OpenAPI: {{baseUrl}}/docs

exec: if (!baseUrl) { throw new Error("Select Platform V2 — Local environment before sending requests."); }
throw new Error("Run Authentication > Login (" + (isAdmin ? "super_admin" : "tenant_admin") + ") first.");
pm.request.auth = { type: "bearer", bearer: [{ key: "token", value: token, type: "string" }] };
if (!tenantId) throw new Error("Set tenantId in environment.");

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Supabase email/password login. Tokens saved to environment (expire ~1h — re-run when 401).

item.name: E2E Read Workflow
item.description: Supabase login then full read path. Picks latest completed scan.

item.name: E2E Write Workflow
item.description: Login, trigger scan, poll until complete (~60s real AWS).

request.description: Re-run until status is completed or failed.
Customer decision API — severity counts and top risks.
What to fix first — sorted by severity and exposure.
